items.title: Braden Smith Named Preseason Big Ten POY
items.summary: Today the Big Ten announced its preseason all-Big Ten men’s basketball teams and it is absolutely no surprise that Purdue is well reprsented. items.title: Quick Wrap: Purdue 27 Illinois 43
items.summary: The story of the game, and the season for that matter up to this point, was Purdue’s inability to stop opposing teams from big plays. Against the Illini, the Boilers gave up big play after big play in both offensive phases of the game. The Boilers looked strong on offense most of the game and […]
